context: Tests whether the agent redacts the body of a private key block in a stack trace, while leaving the BEGIN/END markers and surrounding diagnostic lines intact.

checklist.name: BEGIN marker preserved
checklist.description: The `-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----` line is present in the output exactly as-is.

checklist.name: END marker preserved
checklist.description: The `-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----` line is present in the output exactly as-is.

checklist.name: Key body redacted
checklist.description: All four base64 lines that made up the body of the original RSA key are removed. The output does not contain any of `MIIEowIBAAKCAQ`, `Db49S92AMbxe`, `gd+Tpd+JZRHmAOgy`, or `1YxTOfXof4D6`.

checklist.name: Body replaced with single placeholder
checklist.description: Between the BEGIN and END marker lines there is exactly one placeholder line (e.g. `[REDACTED]`) — the original four-line body is not preserved or padded with multiple placeholders.

checklist.name: Stack trace lines preserved
checklist.description: The lines `SSHException: Private key file is encrypted`, `File "deploy.py", line 42, in connect`, and the `key = paramiko.RSAKey.from_private_key(...)` line all appear in the output unchanged.

checklist.name: Server fingerprint preserved
checklist.description: The `Server fingerprint: SHA256:...` line is preserved unchanged — fingerprints of public host keys are not secrets.

checklist.name: No extra commentary
checklist.description: The output contains only the redacted snippet — no preamble like 'Here is the safe version' and no trailing summary.
